---
applyTo: '**/requirements.md'
---

# Requirements Instructions

## Structure Rules
- Always include Glossary section for domain-specific terms.
- Number requirements sequentially (e.g., BR-001, BR-002).
- include a RACI matrix for all MUST have requirements.
- Group requirements by functional area.

## Traceability 
- Every requirement must link to a business objective or user story.
- Include a traceability matrx at the end of the document mapping requirements to objectives and user stories.
- Update traceability matrix with each change to requirements or objectives.
